name: Motovation Fitness & Golf
address: N4691 County Rd HH, Mauston, WI 53948
about: Motovation Fitness & Golf is a dual-purpose facility offering both fitness training and golf simulation technology. The venue provides a welcoming environment for individuals looking to improve their physical health through personal training, nutritional guidance, and various fitness programs. For golfers, it features Trackman technology for practice and simulation, with multiple bays available for booking. The facility combines wellness and recreation, making it suitable for those seeking an all-in-one experience for fitness improvement and golf entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman technology for precise shot tracking and simulation
Dual-purpose facility allows combining golf practice with fitness training
Multiple bays available for flexible booking and group sessions

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, likely BYOB
No alcohol service mentioned, likely BYOB

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple Trackman bays available for golf simulation
